title: CMA response to the Cabinet Office's public procurement consultation
body: "The CMA’s response to the Public Procurement: Growing British industry, jobs and skills - consultation on further reforms to public procurement sets out the relevance of market shaping in public procurement and, how government can use proactive market shaping to ensure public procurement delivers wider economic objectives. It also provides views on the practical approaches to do this, informed by CMA experience and casework.  Additionally, it provides specific responses to questions on a proposed public interest test for sourcing decisions and the application of social value criteria in tenders.  For queries relating to the CMA’s response, please contact the CMA advocacy team by email at advocacy@cma.gov.uk. "
